chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abu Al-Ward

text: ه عن أبي الورد فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن عليّ بن رئاب، عن أبي الورد.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abu Al-Ward has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Ali ibn Ri'ab, from Abu Al-Ward.
